title: eriogonum calcareum var. sceptrum
intro: Eriogonum calcareum var. sceptrum, also known as Sceptrum Buckwheat or California Buckwheat, is a perennial flowering plant native to the western coast of North America. The medicinal properties of Eriogonum calcareum var. sceptrum include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Eriogonum calcareum var. sceptrum can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and stems can be used in salves and ointments for topical application.
